overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing characters walking through a futuristic urban pathway at night. The scene transitions from a narrow concrete walkway with graffiti to an elevated wooden path lined with neon lights, culminating in a dramatic upward pan revealing towering cyberpunk megastructures with bright neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow concrete walkway between retaining walls with graffiti art

events.description: approaching concrete stairs at end of walkway

agents.ego_description: following a character in a red vest along a narrow concrete pathway between walls

notable_agents.action: character in red vest with backpack walking ahead along the left wall
woman in white tank top walking toward camera on the right side

entered.detail: tall gray concrete retaining wall running along left side of path
large painted mural showing shield with crossed swords and text LA LEALTAD
illuminated cyberpunk skyscrapers visible through the gap between buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow concrete walkway between tall walls at night. A character in a red vest walks ahead while a woman in white approaches from the opposite direction. Graffiti art decorates the right wall, and futuristic skyscrapers glow in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete staircase ascending between walls with emerging vegetation

events.description: begins ascending wide concrete stairs between retaining walls
emerging from shadow into area with more ambient neon light and visible vegetation

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs following two characters upward toward an elevated area

notable_agents.action: character in red vest ascending stairs ahead
character in white tank top walking up stairs alongside

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with multiple steps ascending between retaining walls
tall cylindrical light fixture emitting bright white-green neon light
thick trees and bushes visible beyond the left wall

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a concrete staircase flanked by walls, following two characters upward. Vertical neon light posts illuminate the path as dense vegetation becomes visible on the left. The futuristic cityscape draws closer as the stairs lead to an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway with neon lighting and people resting along walls

events.description: reaches top of stairs and transitions onto wooden walkway platform
passing by people sitting and resting along the right wall with belongings

agents.ego_description: walking along wooden pathway following two characters through an area with people sitting on the sides

notable_agents.action: character in red vest walking steadily ahead on wooden path
character in white tank top walking alongside and looking around

entered.detail: elevated wooden plank walkway surface replacing concrete
tall palm trees lining the left side of the walkway
elevated walkway or transport bridge spanning across the path ahead

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto an elevated wooden walkway, the scene opens with palm trees on the left and a graffiti-covered wall on the right where people sit with their belongings. Vertical neon posts illuminate the path as the camera follows two characters toward a distant overhead bridge structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open wooden promenade with futuristic cityscape backdrop transitioning to upward view

events.description: character in white tank top turns around and gestures animatedly before moving away
camera tilts upward to focus on the towering cyberpunk architecture and neon signs overhead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward then looking up at the massive cyberpunk architecture and neon signs overhead

notable_agents.action: character in white tank top turns back, gestures, then runs off to the right
character in red vest continues walking ahead into the distance

entered.detail: towering multi-level cyberpunk structures with illuminated windows and neon signage
large glowing digital billboards with bright pink and blue neon colors
large yellow-orange cylindrical transport pipe running horizontally overhead

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the wooden walkway as the two characters separate, with one turning back animatedly. The camera then tilts dramatically upward, revealing massive cyberpunk skyscrapers, bright neon billboards, and an overhead transport tube against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow urban corridor that gradually ascends into a sprawling, neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape. It begins on a concrete walkway between tall walls decorated with graffiti, where a character in a red vest walks forward as another woman approaches from the opposite direction. As the camera follows the characters upward, the scene shifts from the concrete path to a staircase flanked by vertical neon posts and dense vegetation, drawing the futuristic skyline closer. The movement then emerges onto an elevated wooden walkway lined with palm trees and resting figures, continuing toward a distant overhead bridge. Finally, as the characters separate, the camera tilts dramatically upward to reveal massive skyscrapers, glowing billboards, and a transport tube stretching across the night sky.
